things.name: Binhai Road Scenic Drive
things.description: Spectacular coastal road winding around cliffs, golden beaches and bays

things.name: Laohutan Ocean Park
things.description: Cliffside ocean park with a polar world, shark aquarium and rides

things.name: Zhongshan Square (Russian Architecture)
things.description: Eight-road intersection with the finest Russian colonial architecture in China

things.name: Dalian Discovery Kingdom
things.description: Large theme park and water park with some of the tallest roller coasters in Asia

things.name: Xinghai Square & Bay
things.description: One of the world's largest public squares by area on the Dalian seafront

things.name: Lushun (Port Arthur) Military Museum
things.description: Russo-Japanese War battlefields and the 203 Hill where the naval battle was decided

things.name: Dalian Natural History Museum
things.description: Dalian's remarkable prehistoric marine fossil collection

things.name: Modern Museum of Dalian
things.description: History of Dalian from Russian and Japanese colonial times to the present

things.name: Seafood at Gangwan Square
things.description: Grilled scallops, sea urchin and hairy crab at the Dalian seafood market
